name: Finnick Tinkersong
sd_appearance: gnome-sized frame, 2'6", wiry and darting, pale skin etched with soot and ink stains, black hair tangled into a frayed braid, eyes sharp and amber-brown, pupils dilated with constant vigilance, patchwork cloak stitched from scraps of scaled mail, faded embroidery of a broken guild crest, left ear cropped short with a jagged scar curling toward the temple, crossbow slung across one shoulder its stock cracked and splintered, warhammer dangling from a leather strap with a rusted chain, fingers stained ink-black from repairing enchanted gears, a single silver gear pendant hidden beneath the collar, glinting faintly in the dim light.
faction_visual: rank-appropriate gear from leather to enchanted plate, Guild badge displayed
style_note: worn leather and chainmail, equipment that tells a story of past contracts
